---
name: Platform Update
about: Report a marketing platform change (ad specs, algorithm updates, new features)
title: "[Platform] "
labels: platform-update
assignees: ''
---

## Platform
Which platform changed? (Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Email ESP, Analytics, etc.)

## What Changed
Describe the update — new ad specs, algorithm change, new ad format, policy update, deprecated feature, etc.

## Source
Link to the official announcement or documentation.

## Date of Change
When did this take effect?

## Impact on Skill
Which sections of the skill need updating? (SKILL.md, references/ad-copy.md, references/email.md, references/analytics.md, etc.)

## Suggested Update
If you know the fix, describe or paste the corrected text.
